name: @humans-of-ai/cloudcode
description: CloudCode — Remote control for your local AI coding agents

scripts.build:sidecar: mkdir -p bin && cd sidecar && go build -o ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar ./cmd/cloudcode-pty-sidecar && (command -v codesign > /dev/null 2>&1 && codesign --force --sign - ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar || true)
scripts.build:sidecar:all: mkdir -p bin && cd sidecar && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/cloudcode-pty-sidecar && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar-darwin-x64 ./cmd/cloudcode-pty-sidecar && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar-linux-x64 ./cmd/cloudcode-pty-sidecar && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar-linux-arm64 ./cmd/cloudcode-pty-sidecar && (command -v codesign > /dev/null 2>&1 && codesign --force --sign - ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar-darwin-arm64 ../bin/cloudcode-pty-sidecar-darwin-x64 || true)
scripts.bundle: npm run build:sidecar:all && cd ../frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && rm -rf frontend-dist && cp -r ../frontend/dist ./frontend-dist
scripts.prepack: npm run bundle && SKIP_SIDECAR=1 npm run build
